name: linux-codex-app
description: Linux RPM release tooling and runtime patches for Codex Desktop.

scripts.check: node scripts/check-release-inputs.mjs && node scripts/test-linux-runtime-patch-locators.mjs && node scripts/test-linux-browser-runtime.mjs && node scripts/test-linux-node-repl-browser-approval.mjs && node scripts/test-dolphin-plugin.mjs && node scripts/test-kitty-plugin.mjs
scripts.check:syntax: find scripts plugins -type f \( -name '*.mjs' -o -name '*.js' \) -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 node --check
